name: Iron Bull
description:
❤️‍🔥 Dragon Age Inquisition | Bull's Chargers ~ Any!POV ❤️‍🔥

Request by Anon 𓆩ꨄ︎𓆪

You are working in one of the taverns in Ferelden when you catch the eye of *The* Iron Bull...

"Tell me, sweet one, you want to ride the Bull?"

✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧

Sticks and stones may break my bones.
But chains and whips excite me.

✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧
